commands.review_summary:
The PR adds process-local quarantine for failing non-legacy context engines, downgrades later context-engine work to legacy, exposes quarantine health state, and updates docs plus fixture coverage.

PR surface: Source +442, Tests +469, Docs +14, Other +26. Total +951 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live repro was run in this read-only review. Source inspection gives a medium-confidence path: current main has resolve-time fallback only, while the PR adds runtime lifecycle quarantine and tests the failure paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is the right lane because the remaining blockers are fallback-policy and validation acceptance on a protected maintainer PR, not a separate narrow repair job.

target.title: fix(context-engine): quarantine broken plugin engines
target.body:
## Summary

- quarantine non-legacy context engines when registration, factory, contract validation, or guarded lifecycle calls fail, then downgrade subsequent context-engine work to `legacy`
- make active runtime-quarantine proxies expose fallback metadata/owner after same-turn downgrade, so `info.id`, `ownsCompaction`, and owner-derived runtime context no longer keep stale plugin state
- keep same-call `compact()` failures fail-closed after quarantine to avoid running legacy compaction after plugin-owned compaction pre-hooks already fired
- surface quarantined engines through `openclaw health` and cached Gateway health responses without stale cached state
- add kitchen-sink ClawHub fixture coverage for context-engine registration/inspect, plus docs for the failure-isolation contract

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot` (41 passed)
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/subagent-spawn.context.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot` (59 passed)
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.tooling.config.ts test/scripts/kitchen-sink-plugin-assertions.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-methods.config.ts src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts -t "merges live context-engine quarantine state" --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/context-engine/registry.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/context-engine/registry.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Autoreview loops: accepted and fixed metadata/owner fallback finding; accepted and fixed compact same-call fallback finding; final committed-branch pass clean, no accepted/actionable findings reported
- Crabbox/Testbox kitchen-sink targeted proof: provider `blacksmith-testbox`, id `tbx_01ksq770bq78c549cxm4eb6101`, command `OPENCLAW_KITCHEN_SINK_PLUGIN_SCENARIOS="clawhub-latest|clawhub:@openclaw/kitchen-sink@latest|openclaw-kitchen-sink-fixture|clawhub|success|basic" corepack pnpm test:docker:kitchen-sink-plugin`, exit 0
- Crabbox/Testbox changed gate on earlier PR head: provider `blacksmith-testbox`, id `tbx_01ksq9w02qp80b09hp69xz30by`, Actions run `https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26575469448`, command `corepack pnpm check:changed`, exit 0
- Crabbox/Testbox changed gate on amended head `1b50bcd19d0`: provider `blacksmith-testbox`, id `tbx_01ksr6416faf67geffgbf9nde5`, Actions run `https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26601901431`, command `git fetch --unshallow origin || true; git fetch origin +main:refs/remotes/origin/main; git merge-base origin/main HEAD; corepack pnpm check:changed`; merge-base was repaired, then `pnpm install` hung for 18m and was stopped, exit 255
- LCM follow-up probe: direct AWS Crabbox `run_9956a11f7a0f` tested PR head `8b58e4e` plus `@martian-engineering/lossless-claw@0.11.3` under the strict Crabpot `--expect must-pass` recall gate and failed with `memory-recall-mismatch`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: broken third-party context-engine plugins can no longer keep the active OpenClaw reply path stuck on stale plugin metadata after the process downgrades method calls to `legacy`.

Real environment tested: focused local unit/agent tests plus Blacksmith Testbox via Crabbox for the Docker kitchen-sink ClawHub fixture install/enable/inspect/uninstall path.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: the focused context-engine and agent commands listed above, plus the amended-head Testbox changed-gate attempt listed above.

Evidence after fix: runtime quarantine now updates same-resolved-engine `info` and owner lookup to fallback metadata; runner runtime-context call sites re-resolve owner metadata instead of carrying stale plugin ids; first-call compact failures quarantine but do not same-call fallback through legacy after plugin-owned prework.

Observed result after fix: failing plugin context engines are logged, quarantined, visible in health, and downgraded to `legacy`; abort/cancel control flow is not quarantined; subagent preparation failures still fail the active spawn closed while quarantining future resolves; compact failures quarantine and fail the active compaction call to avoid duplicate hook/checkpoint side effects.

What was not tested: a clean amended-head `pnpm check:changed` completion because the Testbox run hung in `pnpm install` after merge-base repair. Live lossless-claw was probed separately through Crabpot and still fails semantic summary-backed recall after rotate; that is outside this PR's quarantine/downgrade boundary and remains follow-up work.
